entry.title: Claude API Tutorial: Your First Request in 5 Minutes
entry.summary: Step-by-step guide to making your first Claude API call. Covers getting an API key, request format, Python and curl examples, and handling responses.

entry.title: Anthropic API vs OpenAI API: Developer Experience Compared
entry.summary: Practical developer comparison of the Anthropic Claude API and OpenAI API. Authentication, SDKs, request formats, error handling, streaming, and pricing.
